name: All American Flag Dessert
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Jell-o Brand Berry Blue Flavor Gelatin, 4 serving size
2 packages Jello Brand gelatin dessert, any red flavor, 4 serving size
1 package jello brand lemon flavor gelatin dessert, 4 serving size
1 tub Cool Whip Whipped Topping, 8oz, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir 1 1/2 cups boiling water into each of the Berry Blue and red gelatin mixtures in separate bowls until dissolved, allowing to sit for at least 2 minutes.
2. Stir 1 1/2 cups cold water into each bowl.
3. Spray a 13x9 inch pan with non-stick cooking spray and place it on a cookie sheet. Pour the Berry Blue gelatin into the pan and refrigerate for 45 minutes until set but not firm (gelatin should stick to fingers when touched and should mound).
4. Refrigerate the red gelatin in its bowl for 45 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, stir the remaining 1 cup boiling water into the Lemon gelatin mixture in a bowl until dissolved, allowing to sit for at least 2 minutes.
6. Refrigerate the Lemon gelatin for 25 minutes or until slightly thickened (consistency of beaten egg whites), stirring occasionally.
7. Stir in the whipped topping with a wire whisk and gently spread over the Berry Blue gelatin in the pan. Refrigerate for an additional 10 minutes or until set but not firm.
8. Gently spoon the thickened red gelatin over the gelatin mixture in the pan. Refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight until firm.
9. Decorate with additional whipped topping and fruit (such as blueberries and strawberries) to resemble a flag. Makes 16 servings.
